data.description:
## Context
rebar evolved from a plugin-era "DSO workflow" system; the DSO config machinery
was supposed to be fully removed but a verified sweep (2026-06-16) found residual
references. The heavy machinery is already GONE from source — no read-config.sh in
src/, no .claude/dso-config.conf, no dso.workflow/merge.strategy/review.max_cycles
keys, no DSO_* env support (the reconciler dropped it; a regression test guards it).
Removal is ~95% complete; what remains is mostly cosmetic plus one functional
back-compat decision.

## What remains (verified inventory)
- One LIVE functional item: WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE env var (src/rebar/_engine_support/
  lookups.py:67, highest precedence in _display_mode) — a legacy config-file env name.
- DSO-lineage comments/docstrings in src (next_batch_files.py, applier/outbound_differ/
  inbound_translate docstrings).
- DSO naming in tests (mock CLI paths /fake/dso, stale "dso ticket ..." comments).
- Stale __pycache__ artifacts of already-renamed tests; one script local var (dso_label).

## MUST NOT TOUCH (verified legitimate)
- "DSO-<id>" Jira PROJECT-KEY fixtures across tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/** and
  tests/scripts/bridge/** (~100+; sample Jira project "DSO", real test data).
- tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/mutate/test_env_aliasing.py — regression guard that
  DSO_* support STAYS removed; keep it.
- _read_config_value / _display_mode logic — DSO-derived but now LIVE, reading
  rebar own keys (paths.*, ticket.display_mode). Scrub comments only, keep code.

## Success Criteria
- All vestigial DSO-system references removed or renamed; only the intentional
  test_env_aliasing.py guard and legitimate DSO-<id> Jira fixtures remain.
- WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE back-compat resolved (decision recorded).
- Full suite green; no behavior regression for rebar config resolution.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] WU-1: WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE back-compat decision made + implemented (drop / rename to REBAR_CONFIG_FILE alias / keep)
- [ ] WU-2: DSO lineage scrubbed from src comments/docstrings (next_batch_files.py, reconciler docstrings)
- [ ] WU-3: DSO naming scrubbed from tests (mock /fake/dso paths, stale dso ticket comments) WITHOUT touching DSO-<id> fixtures or test_env_aliasing.py
- [ ] WU-4: stale *dso*.pyc/__pycache__ artifacts cleaned + script dso_label var renamed
- [ ] Acceptance gate: `grep -rniE "dso" src/ tests/ docs/ scripts/ --exclude-dir=.venv | grep -viE "DSO-[0-9]"` returns only the test_env_aliasing.py guard lines
- [ ] Full non-integration suite green
data.title: Remove vestigial DSO references/code (verified sweep)
